text.title: ArgoCD GitOps for Kubernetes Deployments Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the ArgoCD GitOps for Kubernetes Deployments methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: structure-repo
step.action: Create folders per environment (overlays/dev, overlays/staging, overlays/prod).

step.name: compose-application
step.decision-gate: Manually-created Applications in UI for production forbidden.

step.name: derive-appproject
step.action: Compose AppProject scoping sourceRepos + destinations + roles.

step.name: assign-sync-waves
step.action: Annotate sync-wave: namespaces/CRDs=-1, ConfigMap/Secret=0, Deployment=1, Ingress=2.
step.decision-gate: Missing waves on dependent resources rejected.
